case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. MILCA SARAI NAH POLANCO

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT POLANCO, MILCA SARAI NAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-10-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES CONTINUE TO OCTOBER 9, 2018 AT 10AM. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. DEFENDANT MILCA SARAI NAH POLANCO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-10-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND REACHED AN AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT WILL PAY $200.00 A MONTH UNTIL THE DEBT IS PAID IN FULL. IF THE DEFENDANT MAKES THE REQUIRED PAYMENTS THE MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED EVERY SIX MONTHS UNTIL OCTOBER 9, 2018. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MILCA SARAI NAH POLANCO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
